fps_counter.h(3) Library Functions Manual fps_counter.h(3)

NAME

fps_counter.h - ⏱️ FPS counter for measuring output write throughput

SYNOPSIS

Typedefs


typedef struct fps_counter_s fps_counter_t
Opaque FPS counter handle.

Functions


fps_counter_t * fps_counter_create (void)
Create a new FPS counter. void fps_counter_destroy (fps_counter_t *counter)
Destroy FPS counter and free resources. void fps_counter_tick (fps_counter_t *counter)
Record a frame timestamp. float fps_counter_get (fps_counter_t *counter)
Get the current FPS value.

Detailed Description

⏱️ FPS counter for measuring output write throughput

Definition in file fps_counter.h.
